levels.subtitle: Foundations of AI & ML
levels.description: Learn the basics of artificial intelligence and machine learning.

levels.subtitle: Intermediate ML Concepts
levels.description: Dive deeper into machine learning fundamentals and types of learning.

levels.subtitle: DSA for Interviews
levels.description: Master data structures and algorithms to crack technical interviews.

levels.subtitle: Deep Reinforcement Learning
levels.description: Master RL from MDPs to DQN, Actor-Critic, PPO, and SAC. Learn value-based and policy-based methods for training intelligent agents.

levels.subtitle: Large Language Models
levels.description: Master LLMs from embeddings and tokenization to Transformers, BERT, GPT, and practical applications. Build with state-of-the-art language models.
